description: Seed prompts for dataset generation - Phase 3

simple: Write a function to add two numbers
Create a function that returns 'Hello World'
Implement a function to check if a number is even
Write a function to reverse a string
Create a function to find the maximum of two numbers
Implement a function to calculate the factorial of a number
Write a function to check if a string is a palindrome
Create a function to count vowels in a string
Implement a function to convert Celsius to Fahrenheit
Write a function to calculate the sum of elements in a list
medium: Write a function to merge two sorted arrays
Create a function to find the nth Fibonacci number
Implement a function to validate email addresses using regex
Write a function to remove duplicates from a list
Create a class to represent a stack with push and pop operations
Implement a function to find all prime numbers up to n
Write a function to perform breadth-first search on a tree
Create a function to calculate the longest common subsequence
Write a function to detect cycles in a linked list
Create a function to implement quicksort
Implement a function to validate balanced parentheses
Write a function to find the kth largest element in an array
Create a class for a basic banking account with deposit and withdraw
complex_algorithms: Implement dynamic programming solution for the knapsack problem
Write an algorithm to solve the N-Queens problem using backtracking
Create a function to find strongly connected components in a graph

Implement a suffix tree for pattern matching
concurrency: Implement a thread-safe singleton pattern in Python
Write a producer-consumer pattern using threading and queues

Write a solution to the dining philosophers problem
Create an async/await example for concurrent HTTP requests
Implement a rate limiter with thread safety

Create a thread-safe counter with atomic operations
optimization: Optimize this bubble sort implementation for better performance
Improve the time complexity of this nested loop to O(n)
Refactor this code to reduce memory usage
Optimize this database query to avoid N+1 problem
Improve this recursive function using memoization
Optimize this string concatenation in a loop
Reduce the space complexity of this DP solution
Improve the performance of this file processing code
Optimize this API endpoint for handling concurrent requests
Refactor this code to use lazy evaluation for better efficiency
system_design: Design a URL shortening service like bit.ly
Architecture for a real-time chat application
Design a rate limiting system for an API gateway
Architecture for a content delivery network (CDN)
Design a distributed task queue system
Design a logging and monitoring system for microservices
Architecture for a video streaming platform
debugging: Fix this IndexError in list access
Debug why this function returns None instead of the expected value
Find the bug causing infinite loop in this code
Fix the memory leak in this long-running process
Debug why this async function doesn't execute as expected
Fix the race condition in this multi-threaded code
Debug why this regex pattern doesn't match correctly
Fix the off-by-one error in this binary search
Debug why this API call times out
Fix the null pointer exception in this code

Create a red-black tree with insertion and deletion

Create a bloom filter for membership testing
Implement a skip list data structure
Create a disjoint set (union-find) data structure

Write a function to sanitize user input to prevent XSS

Implement CORS middleware for an API
